policy: First outreach batch prioritizes no-website, placeholder, broken-site, or clearly weak-site prospects. Strong-site prospects require audit/campaign/video angles instead. Do not send outbound email until Stark approves exact recipients and message content. Outreach voice must sound human/local: specific observation, plain language, no canned opt-out commands, no generic micro-CTAs, no AI-ish pressure disclaimers.

offer_strategy: Gap-based upsell: sell the missing or weakest revenue lever, not the same website offer to everyone. No/broken/placeholder site -> website or landing page. No/weak logo -> logo/brand refresh. Needs calls/foot traffic or weak local visibility -> SEO, Google Business Profile cleanup, or paid ads. Already has decent web/SEO/brand -> video ads, short-form creatives, commercial shoot, remarketing assets, or campaign landing page.
